description: A graphic in the style of a vintage Art Deco travel poster with a red sky. Two stylized propeller aircraft fly above; the lower aircraft bears the words 'DEPARTMENT OF HOMELAND SECURITY' along its fuselage and the upper aircraft reads 'SAFE TRAVELS!'. A gray band at the bottom carries large text reading 'FREE TICKET HOME' and '$2600 EXIT BONUS', with 'DHS.GOV/CBPHOME' below.
notable_text: SAFE TRAVELS!; DEPARTMENT OF HOMELAND SECURITY; FREE TICKET HOME; $2600 EXIT BONUS; DHS.GOV/CBPHOME
